clusters.justification: These terms align along a macroscopic functional axis rooted in amygdalo-cortical and insular pathways dedicated to the generation, experience, and regulation of valenced internal states.

These concepts share co-activation across striatal and orbitofrontal neural circuitry, representing a broad domain responsible for computing expected outcomes, incentive salience, and goal-directed action.

This cluster maps robustly onto the cortical midline structures of the default mode network, reflecting a generalized, internally-directed system for representing temporal narratives, agents, and self-constructs.
